description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a duck with a streamlined, elongated body and a slightly upturned tail. Its plumage is predominantly mottled brown and tan, with subtle patterning along the back and wings, and a lighter underbelly. The head is smoothly contoured, featuring a flat, broad bill that is slightly orange at the tip. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail feathers are neatly aligned. The feet are not visible, suggesting the duck is in a resting or floating posture. The overall appearance is naturalistic, with fine feather details and a lifelike texture.
description: A lifelike brown and tan duck with detailed feather patterns, a broad bill, and a streamlined body in a resting pose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the duck, highlighting the detailed feather patterns and the shape of the bill.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back and tail feathers, with the head barely visible and wings tucked in.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the duck and the contour of the body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the head, bill, and chest, with the symmetrical alignment of the body and tail visible.
